case_title: ASTA FUNDING ACQUISITION II LLC VS. VLADIMIR NOVITSK et al

docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASTA FUNDING ACQUISITION II LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NOVITSK, VLADIMIR 1-30 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-07-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-09-2002

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOVITSK, VLADIMIR $8,415.58 PRINCIPAL, $3,525.06 INTEREST, $154.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,095.14, TOTAL $ 12,095.14 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
